title: Sending emails is security sensitive
description: Sending emails directly from code can expose sensitive information and be a security risk.
message: Avoid sending emails directly from the code.
recommendation: Use an email service that handles authentication and encryption.

noncompliant.description: Sending an email directly using SMTP

compliant.code:
from email.mime.text import MIMEText

smtp = smtplib.SMTP('smtp.example.com')
smtp.sendmail('sender@example.com', 'receiver@example.com', MIMEText('Hello World!'))
smtp.quit()
compliant.description: Using an email service to send an email

why_is_this_an_issue: Directly sending emails can expose sensitive information and be vulnerable to phishing attacks if not properly authenticated and encrypted.
how_to_fix: Use an email service that handles authentication and encryption.
